---
title: Common Distributions
description: Bernoulli, binomial, uniform, and normal distributions.
---

::: {.learning-objectives}
### Learning Objectives

- Recognize common probability distributions.
- Compute binomial probabilities.
- Match distributions to situations.
:::

```{python}
from edumath.probability.distributions import binomial_pmf

binomial_pmf(trials=10, successes=3, probability=0.5)
```

## Practice

::: {.practice-box}
1. Which distribution models one yes/no trial?
2. Which distribution models the number of successes in fixed trials?
3. Which distribution is often used for measurement noise?
:::
